description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named generate bundles that triggers on push events. The workflow has two jobs: build-win and publish_packages. The build-win job runs on a windows-latest environment with a matrix strategy for x64 architecture and ai_ready variations. It checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.12, installs dependencies, and generates InVesalius bundles for Windows with and without AI readiness. The publish_packages job depends on build-win, downloads the generated artifacts, and publishes them as a nightly release.
